markdown:
# Athlete

You gain the following benefits.

## Climb Speed

You gain a [[climb_speed]] equal to your [[speed]].

## Hop Up

When you have the [[prone]] condition, you can right yourself with only 5 feet of movement.

## Jumping

You can make a running [[long_jump|Long]] or [[high_jump]] after moving only 5 feet.
